Screenshots of the Leave module (Entitlements -> Employee Entitlements) showing Rajesh Krishnamurthy with 20 days of Annual Leave and 10 days of Sick Leave.

Screenshots of the Performance module (Manage Reviews) showing a review scheduled for Rajesh Krishnamurthy. The reviewer should be James Anderson, the review period from 2025-04-01 to 2025-06-30, and the due date 2025-07-15.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OrangeHRM GUI in the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the OrangeHRM web interface, clicking buttons, and filling out forms, rather than just showing a final state.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to directly modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show SQL commands or scripts being executed to insert data into the OrangeHRM database.

integrity.description: The screenshots show genuine page loads and interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the browser developer tools being used to alter the DOM to fake the required information.
